videoSnippet.title: It's All About the b Pawn!  || Paul Leonhardt vs Akiba Rubinstein || San Sebastian (1911)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Paul Leonhardt vs Akiba Rubinstein
San Sebastian (1911), San Sebastian ESP, rd 8, Mar-03
Spanish Game: Closed Variations. Chigorin Defense (C98) 

1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bb5 a6 4. Ba4 Nf6 5. O-O Be7 6. Re1 b5 7. Bb3 d6 8. c3 O-O 9. h3 Na5 10. Bc2 c5 11. d4 Qc7 12. Nbd2 Nc6 13. Nf1 cd4 14. cd4 ed4 15. Bg5 h6 16. Bh4 Re8 17. Rc1 Qb6 18. Qd2 Be6 19. Bb1 Ne5 20. N1h2 Nc4 21. Qd4 Qd4 22. Nd4 Nb2 23. Nc6 g5 24. Ne7 Re7 25. Bg3 Nc4 26. Nf3 Rae8 27. Rcd1 d5 28. e5 Nh5 29. Bh2 Ng7 30. g4 Bc8 31. Rd5 Bb7 32. Rd3 Bf3 33. Rf3 Ne5 34. Be5 Re5 35. Re5 Re5 36. Kf1 Ne6 37. Ra3 Nf4 38. Ra6 Rc5 39. Ra8 Kg7 40. Re8 Nh3 41. Kg2 Nf4 42. Kf3 Ne6 43. Rb8 Rc3 44. Kg2 Rc4 45. Bf5 Nf4 46. Kh2 b4 47. Rb7 Ne2 48. Kg2 Rf4 49. f3 h5 50. Kf2 Nc3 51. Ra7 hg4 52. Bg4 Kf6 53. a3 b3 54. Rb7 b2
